name: Cala en Turqueta
description: Almost unreal turquoise water and fine sand sheltered by pines. More tucked-away and family-friendly, it's one of the best-loved coves in the south-west. The name says it all.

practicalInfo.acceso: Short walk (~10-15 min) from the car park along a pine-shaded path
practicalInfo.aparcamiento: Free car park that fills early in summer
practicalInfo.servicios: No beach bar: bring water, food and shade
practicalInfo.mejorEpoca: May, June and September; in August, very early

seo.description: Cala Turqueta, in south-west Menorca: almost unreal turquoise water and fine sand sheltered by pines. A tucked-away, family-friendly cove. Best early.

planner.shuttleInfo: Keeps car access in summer, but the car park fills up very early (arrive ~8:00). Seasonal shuttle bus from Ciutadella too. Common starting point for the walk to Macarella.
planner.effortNote: 10-15 min path through pines from the car park; firm but not suitable for wheelchairs or strollers.
